rows.label: qev041906_MSG0001
rows.name:
He is here, he is here, mo! The worm
whose only purpose in life is to be
trampled by Jalolo has arrived, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0002
rows.name:
So what will it be, mo? Will you return the
money, cut that hair... or break the contract
and be banished from the Nopon, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0003
rows.name:
Come on, make the choice that will
make Jalolo laugh the hardest, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0004
rows.name:
...I could not prepare the
money, mo. Therefore... I will
give this hair to Jalolo, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0005
rows.name:
I see! Then let me see you cut it right
this instant, mo! And you will live a
shameful life as a hairless Nopon, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Then Popo will be the one to cut it, mo. You
should watch closely with your own eyes the
result... of the foolish contract you made, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0007
rows.name:
Well then... here I go.
Are you ready, Nio?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0008
rows.name:
If it is Popo, I do not mind
whatever she does, mo. Come on...
do it without holding back, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0009
rows.name:
Gehyahya! What a pathetic sight, mo!
Young lady, you had better give up
on marrying a Nopon like this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0010
rows.name:
That is right! Why don't you get
together with Jalolo, who has both
money and a splendid head of hair, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_JNK0010
rows.name: Get Angry

rows.label: qev041906_SEL0011
rows.name: Protest against the laughing Jalolo.

rows.label: qev041906_JNK0020
rows.name: Watch

rows.label: qev041906_SEL0021
rows.name: Watch over Nio and Popo.

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0011
rows.name:
There was no contract saying I could not laugh,
mo! Besides, what else are you supposed to do
but make fun of such an embarrassing guy, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0012
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]... Thank you, mo. But it is okay.
Nio does not mind this at all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0013
rows.name:
Because even looking like this, I
have Popo who loves me... I do not
care how much I am laughed at, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you pluck out all of your
completely filthy heart and hand
it over, I might consider it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0015
rows.name:
Shall we make a contract while we are
at it? Popo does not mind at all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0016
rows.name: Ugh... What annoying people, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hmph... Anyway, the contract is fulfilled with
this, mo. Carry that pathetic head for the rest
of your life and live disgracefully, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0018
rows.name:
He went away, mo. Hehe... Does this
count as a massive success, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0019
rows.name:
Yes, mo! It seems that man did not
notice it was fake hair at all, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0020
rows.name:
I am so glad... Now we can
finally hold our wedding, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0021
rows.name:
...But right now, Nio is completely penniless,
mo. I will have to start my business from scratch
too, mo. Are you still... okay with that, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0022
rows.name:
Forget about money! As long as I have Nio, that is
all I need, mo. Well... it is a shame I cannot wear
the wedding ring you prepared for me, though, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041906_MSG0023
rows.name:
Thank you, mo... I will work very
hard and absolutely buy you that
sparkly blue ring again, mo![ST:wait ]
